% Determine grid dimensions
Rows := #count{R : input(R, _, _)}.   % number of rows
Cols := #count{C : input(_, _, C)}.   % number of columns

% Delta moves
delta(0,1). delta(0,-1). delta(1,0). delta(-1,0).

% Flood‑fill reachable cells for a given barrier colour B
reachable(B,R,C) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != B,
    R = 0.
reachable(B,R,C) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != B,
    R = Rows-1.
reachable(B,R,C) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != B,
    C = 0.
reachable(B,R,C) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != B,
    C = Cols-1.

reachable(B,R2,C2) :-
    reachable(B,R1,C1),
    delta(DR,DC),
    R2 = R1 + DR,
    C2 = C1 + DC,
    input(R2,C2,V), V != B,
    R2 >= 0,
    R2 < Rows,
    C2 >= 0,
    C2 < Cols.

% Zero cells that are interior (not reachable)
interiorZero(B,R,C) :-
    input(R,C,0),
    not reachable(B,R,C).

% There is exactly one colour that has at least one interior zero
#count{C : (interiorZero(C,R,C)) } = 1.
1 { B : color(B), (interiorZero(B,R,C)) for some R,C } 1 :- true.

% Output: non‑zero cells keep colour
output(R,C,Color) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != 0,
    Color = V.

% Zero cells reachable become 0
output(R,C,0) :-
    input(R,C,0),
    reachable(B,R,C).

% Zero cells interior become 4
output(R,C,4) :-
    input(R,C,0),
    not reachable(B,R,C).

% Exactly one colour per output cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : color(C) } 1 :- true.

% Dimensions
Rows := #count{R : input(R, _, _)}.
Cols := #count{C : input(_, _, C)}.

% Flood fill for colour 1 (wall)
reachable(R,C) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != 1,
    R = 0.
reachable(R,C) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != 1,
    R = Rows-1.
reachable(R,C) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != 1,
    C = 0.
reachable(R,C) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != 1,
    C = Cols-1.

reachable(R2,C2) :-
    reachable(R1,C1),
    delta(DR,DC),
    R2 = R1 + DR,
    C2 = C1 + DC,
    input(R2,C2,V), V != 1,
    R2 >= 0,
    R2 < Rows,
    C2 >= 0,
    C2 < Cols.

% Zero cells reachable become 0; interior become 4
output(R,C,0) :-
    input(R,C,0),
    reachable(R,C).

output(R,C,4) :-
    input(R,C,0),
    not reachable(R,C).

% Non-zero cells keep colour
output(R,C,Color) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != 0,
    Color = V.

% Exactly one colour per cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : color(C) } 1 :- true.

% Exactly one answer set
:- true.

% Dimensions
Rows := #count{R : input(R, _, _)}.
Cols := #count{C : input(_, _, C)}.

% Moves
delta(0,1). delta(0,-1). delta(1,0). delta(-1,0).

% Reachable cells avoiding colour 1
reachable(R,C) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != 1,
    R = 0.
reachable(R,C) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != 1,
    R = Rows-1.
reachable(R,C) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != 1,
    C = 0.
reachable(R,C) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != 1,
    C = Cols-1.

reachable(R2,C2) :-
    reachable(R1,C1),
    delta(DR,DC),
    R2 = R1 + DR,
    C2 = C1 + DC,
    input(R2,C2,V), V != 1,
    R2 >= 0,
    R2 < Rows,
    C2 >= 0,
    C2 < Cols.

% Output
output(R,C,Color) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != 0,
    Color = V.

output(R,C,0) :-
    input(R,C,0),
    reachable(R,C).

output(R,C,4) :-
    input(R,C,0),
    not reachable(R,C).

% Exactly one colour per cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- true.

% Exactly one answer set
:- true.

Rows := #count{R : input(R,_,_)}.
Cols := #count{C : input(_,_,C)}.

delta(0,1). delta(0,-1). delta(1,0). delta(-1,0).

outside(R,C) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != 1,
    R = 0.
outside(R,C) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != 1,
    R = Rows-1.
outside(R,C) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != 1,
    C = 0.
outside(R,C) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != 1,
    C = Cols-1.

outside(R2,C2) :-
    outside(R1,C1),
    delta(DR,DC),
    R2 = R1 + DR,
    C2 = C1 + DC,
    input(R2,C2,V), V != 1,
    R2 >= 0,
    R2 < Rows,
    C2 >= 0,
    C2 < Cols.

% Zero cells reachable => 0, interior => 4
output(R,C,0) :-
    input(R,C,0),
    outside(R,C).

output(R,C,4) :-
    input(R,C,0),
    not outside(R,C).

output(R,C,Color) :-
    input(R,C,V), V != 0,
    Color = V.

% Exactly one colour per cell
1 { output(R,C,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- true.

% Exactly one answer set
:- true.

Rows := #count{R : input(R, _, _)}.
Cols := #count{C : input(_, _, C)}.

delta(0,1). delta(0,-1). delta(1,0). delta(-1,0).

% reachable cells avoid colour 1 (the “wall” colour)
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    R = 0.
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    R = Rows-1.
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    Col = 0.
outside(R,Col) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 1,
    Col = Cols-1.

outside(R2,Col2) :-
    outside(R1,Col1),
    delta(DR,DC),
    R2 = R1 + DR,
    Col2 = Col1 + DC,
    input(R2,Col2,V), V != 1,
    R2 >= 0,
    R2 < Rows,
    Col2 >= 0,
    Col2 < Cols.

output(R,Col,Out) :-
    input(R,Col,V), V != 0,
    Out = V.

output(R,Col,0) :-
    input(R,Col,0),
    outside(R,Col).

output(R,Col,4) :-
    input(R,Col,0),
    not outside(R,Col).

% exactly one colour per cell
1 { output(R,Col,Out) : color(Out) } 1 :- true.

:- true.
</asp>
